steps.title: Distribute 19
steps.content:
Multiply $19$ by both terms inside the parentheses:
$$19(x^2-7)=19x^2-19\cdot7$$

steps.title: Fast choice check
steps.content: A quick check is to plug in $x=0$. The original expression gives $19(0^2-7)=-133$, matching the constant term in choice A and eliminating the other constants.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: $19x^2-133$ matches choice A, so A is correct.
